The '''SonoMax 75''' was a [[sonic pistol]] created by [[SonoMax]] for use by the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] [[Security Police/Legends|Espos]], primarily for crowd control and anti-riot purposes.<ref name="CSS" /><ref name="Gundark" />

The SonoMax 75 could be calibrated for a number of effects: a sonic blast, which could deal heavy damage comparable to a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]], or sonic stun, which delivered a powerful cone-shaped pulse on par with a [[Stun grenade/Legends|stun grenade]], that could incapacitate opponents.<ref name="CSS" /><ref name="Gundark" /> Combined with a twenty meter range, the Sonomax 75 adhered to the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authorities]] policy of powerful riot control weapons with disregard to collateral damage; the stun setting especially was very effective, projecting a .5 meter wide cone at 0-3 meters, a 1.5 meter cone at 10 meters, and a 3 meter wide cone at 20 meters.<ref name="CSS" /><ref name="Gundark" /> Despite the effectiveness of the stun function, it could prove more or less effective depending on the hearing faculties of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] targeted, because of this, the secondary stun function sometimes had to be calibrated for effectiveness - though both functions were nonetheless capable of significant physical impact regardless of calibration, capable of knocking sentients off their feet.<ref name="CSS" /><ref name="Gundark" />
